---
title: "Research"
description-meta: "Information, PDFs, and social metrics of papers"
image: "files/images/profilephoto.JPG"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full


listing:   # Comment the listing section and delete corresponding lines in the index.qmd file to remove the recent posts
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: 
      - posts
      #- posts/post-links.yml
    exclude:
      title: ""
    type: grid
    max-items: 10
#    image-height: 150px
    page-size: 10 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---
